description: Ollama NDJSON streaming with a tool call but `done_reason=length`. Contract fixture validating finishReason precedence: toolCalls => unified `tool-calls`, while preserving raw `done_reason`.

source.notes: Handcrafted fixture because upstream AI SDK does not ship Ollama NDJSON streaming captures. This fixture uses Ollama's NDJSON stream format (not SSE).

notes: We intentionally prioritize `toolCalls` over `done_reason` when deriving the unified finishReason.
